A Good Day to Die.Page: A Good Day to Die (space trait)
A Good Day to Die.name: A Good Day to Die
A Good Day to Die.tooltip:
A Good Day to Die

Personal Space Trait

You are always willing to go down fighting with your ship. Go Down Fighting may be activated at any Hull integrity. Its scaling benefits will function as though your Hull is at 50% Hull Integrity, at most.

  • Go Down Fighting can be used at any Hull Integrity.
  • Go Down Fighting's scaling buff will treat your Hull as at most 50% integrity.

Ablative Shell.tooltip:
Ablative Shell

Taking inspiration from insects, you have installed a special system of shield generators that are able to shed damaged outer defensive layers in order to rapidly replace them with stronger, healthier defenses.

Adaptive Defense.name: Adaptive Defense
Adaptive Defense.tooltip:
Adaptive Defense

Personal Space Trait

Improves Damage Resistance Rating while in combat. Improvement is divided by the number of enemies targeting you.
Shield Harmonics and ship structural integrity fields automatically adapt to incoming fire via borg technology. Without the massive computing power of the Collective, however, the system quickly becomes overwhelmed against multiple adversaries.
Gain 40 Damage Resistance Rating divided by the number of foes targeting you.

Adaptive Offense.name: Adaptive Offense
Adaptive Offense.tooltip:
Adaptive Offense

Personal Space Trait

Improves Critical Strike chance. On successfully Critically Striking, a third of this improvement converts to a greater amount of Critical Severity for a moderate duration. This can happen up to three times, and each time all such durations are reset.
Borg technology is full of clever mechanisms of adaptation. Even ancillary features have flex built in. It is in some ways the raw stuff of natural selection, distilled out from countless species by the sifting action of assimilation.

Gain 2.7% Critical Chance

On Critically Striking, 0.9% Critical Chance becomes 3% Critical Severity for 10 sec

Max 9% Critical Severity

Aetherian Beam Enhancements.name: Aetherian Beam Enhancements
Aetherian Beam Enhancements.tooltip:
Aetherian Beam Enhancements

Personal Space Trait

While this trait is slotted, attacking foes with energy weapons grants you a stack of Aetherian Beam Enhancements (max 1 per 2 seconds). Each stack provides you with a 1% Energy Damage Bonus. At 15 stacks, your next attack detonates a Proton Release at your target's location, dealing Proton Damage and Holding up to 3 nearby foes in a 5km radius for 5 seconds, while also removing all stacks of Aetherian Proton Enhancements. Proton Release has a 2.5% chance of causing a Protonic Crush which becomes stronger based on the number of targets around you which are affected.

Personal Space Trait

An Aetherian console which was originally designed to charge weapons from external energy sources has been adapted to account for all types of direct damage that hits your hull.
All aspects accounted for lets your ship act as a capacitor to the damage received and then sends out a single proton pulse beam which strikes your current target with a huge blast of proton energy and always applies Protonic Crush on the target.

Personal Space Trait

Spread your inspiration beyond the confines of your ship and to the pets your ship has launched or created.
When activating any Captain Ability, up to 10 pets in a 10km radius have their Critical Chance, Hit Accuracy, Flight Speed, and Turn Rate enhanced for the remainder of their lifetime. This effect lasts until the affected pet either is defeated or times out, but does not stack on subsequent applications.

    • +10 Accuracy Rating

    • 50% Turn Rate

Feel the Weight of Our Presence.tooltip:
Feel the Weight of Our Presence

Personal Space Trait

Space Trait. Each friendly ship on the map debuffs the Damage Resistance Rating of Foes within 12km by 0.5 for 10sec, stacking up to 12.5 for 25 Allies. Mines and Torpedos don't count, but Hangar Pets, Distress Beacons, Turrets, and all other forms of Allies do. The sight of a ship can strike fear into the hearts of foes, but the people represented by that ship form its true strength. A fleet, an alliance, or even just a cause, what matters most is the people it champions. [Applies "Feel the Weight of our Presence": -0.5 All Damage Resistance Rating for 10 sec
